Description:
  Migration tool for converting Marten/Wolverine projects to Whizbang

Usage:
  Whizbang.Migrate [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  analyze                Analyze a project for migration scope
  plan                   Create a migration plan without applying changes
  apply                  Apply migration transformations
  rollback <checkpoint>  Rollback to a checkpoint
  status                 Show migration status

Description:
  Apply migration transformations

Usage:
  Whizbang.Migrate apply [options]

Options:
  -p, --project <project>                                Path to the solution or project file
  -n, --dry-run                                          Show what would be changed without modifying files [default: False]
  -i, --include <include>                                Glob patterns for files to include (e.g., '**/*Handler.cs') []
  -e, --exclude <exclude>                                Glob patterns for files to exclude (e.g., '**/obj/**') []
  -d, --decision-file <decision-file>                    Path to decision file for controlling migration behavior
  -g, --generate-decision-file <generate-decision-file>  Generate a default decision file at the specified path (does not apply migration)
  --no-manage-packages                                   Skip automatic package reference management [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                                         Show help and usage information

Description:
  Apply migration transformations

Usage:
  Whizbang.Migrate apply [options]

Options:
  -p, --project <project>                                Path to the solution or project file
  -n, --dry-run                                          Show what would be changed without modifying files [default: False]
  -i, --include <include>                                Glob patterns for files to include (e.g., '**/*Handler.cs') []
  -e, --exclude <exclude>                                Glob patterns for files to exclude (e.g., '**/obj/**') []
  -d, --decision-file <decision-file>                    Path to decision file for controlling migration behavior
  -g, --generate-decision-file <generate-decision-file>  Generate a default decision file at the specified path (does not apply migration)
  --no-manage-packages                                   Skip automatic package reference management [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                                         Show help and usage information
